design_philosophy: Information-dense, professional NOC (Network Operations Center) telecom dashboard. Strictly functional, utilizing high contrast to highlight system states, real-time metrics, and security controls. No decorative gradients; focus on clarity, precision, and low eye strain.

rules: Use IBM Plex Sans for all navigational and standard UI text.
CRITICAL: Use JetBrains Mono for ALL IPs, CIDRs, phone numbers, ports, session IDs, and FreeSWITCH XML code.
Never center-align table data. Always strictly left-aligned.
Keep line-heights tight (leading-snug or leading-none) to maximize vertical space.

structure.sidebar: w-64 expanded, w-16 collapsed. Contains main navigation (pt-BR).
structure.topbar: h-12 border-b border-border/40. Contains global server status (Uptime, CPU, RAM) and User Menu.
structure.content_area: p-4 or p-6. Very minimal padding to maximize data visibility.

layout_and_spacing.tables: Dense. Use py-2 px-3 for cells. Cardless design (border-collapse, border-y only, no outer wrapper shadows). Hover state: bg-white/5.
layout_and_spacing.widgets: Flat background, 1px solid border (border-white/10), no shadow. Sharp corners (rounded-none or max rounded-sm).

components.status_leds: Use w-2 h-2 rounded-full inline-block. Add 'animate-pulse' only for 'Active' or 'Ringing' live channels.
components.buttons: Utilitarian. Flat colors, 1px border. h-8 px-3 text-xs for table actions.
components.inputs: bg-transparent border-white/10 text-sm focus:ring-1 focus:ring-blue-500 focus:border-transparent.
components.toasts: Bottom-right placement. Used for real-time ACL blocks, route failures, or critical system events.
components.charts: Recharts. Dark theme. Minimal grid lines (stroke-white/5). Use solid lines (stroke-width 2) with Area gradients (opacity 0.1).

assets.icons: lucide-react. Size 16px for inline, 20px for sidebar.

image_urls.description: Dark server room with fiber optic cables. Apply heavy black overlay (bg-black/80) to ensure login form legibility.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup the routing and JWT auth wrapper first. The default view post-login is the Dashboard.
2. Implement the layout with a collapsible sidebar and a top status bar.
3. Sidebar sections must be EXACTLY: Dashboard, Operadoras, IPBX externos, Rotas/LCR, ACL, CDR, Chamadas Ativas, Anti-Fraude, Configurações FreeSWITCH, Usuários.
4. All data tables (Chamadas Ativas, Operadoras, CDR, ACL) must use a dense, cardless design. Apply 'font-mono' to IP and numeric columns.
5. Chamadas Ativas (Live Channels) should simulate real-time data streaming (use useEffect intervals to update durations and statuses). Include a pulse effect on 'Ringing' states.
6. Configurações FreeSWITCH page should display a generated XML payload inside a <pre> block with syntax highlighting colors (e.g., #00FF66 for tags), and a Download button.
7. Every interactive element (buttons, links, inputs, rows) MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='sidebar-link-acl', data-testid='btn-add-operadora').
8. Ensure the entire UI is strictly dark themed and uses the specified colors. NO purple, NO teal. Rely on Graphite, Green, Amber, Red, and Blue (for generic actions).
